tool.speech.language_tip: 💡 Auto Detect is safest. For noisy / accented / short audio, specifying the correct source language can improve accuracy — but picking wrong silently translates to that language.

tool.video.auto_split.title: Auto Split Video
tool.video.auto_split.kf_hint_on: Split at nearest keyframes; fast, no re-encode
tool.video.auto_split.kf_hint_off: Split at exact time; may be slower
tool.video.auto_split.info:
How it works:
• Splits the video into N equal segments
• Keyframe mode snaps to the nearest keyframe for fast stream copy
• Output files are named: originalName_part01, _part02, ...
• Keyframe mode is recommended for the best performance

tool.router.title: AI Console
tool.router.prompts_prompt: Prompts are managed centrally here. Pick a task on the left and edit its template on the right. Each task has one prompt — modified ones are marked ●. 'Save' writes to prompts/<task>.md; 'Reset' restores the bundled default.
tool.router.reset_prompt_confirm_msg: Reset the '{name}' prompt to the built-in default? This overwrites your current edits.
tool.router.routing_prompt: Top: assign each task to a provider/model. Bottom: manage providers (bind keys, refresh models, test connectivity).
tool.router.test_unsupported_for_categor: Quick test for ASR / TTS needs sample input (audio / voice id); slated for the next phase.
tool.router.picker_manual_placeholder: Enter model id and press Enter or click Add
tool.router.refresh_models_ok: ✅ Got {count} models — click Save to persist
tool.router.refresh_unsupported: This provider type does not support remote model listing
tool.router.error_no_base_url: Base URL must not be empty
tool.router.claudecode_hint: Requires the Claude Code CLI installed and logged in (`claude login`). No API key needed.
tool.router.asr_retry_hint: Retries only apply to network errors (connect timeout/read timeout/connection reset). HTTP parameter errors are not retried.
tool.router.error_key_empty: API Key must not be empty

Yes: import all matching files from a folder.
No: pick individual files.

composer.ask_missing_audio: Segments {idxs} have no audio and will be skipped. Continue?
tool.project_workbench.title: Project Workbench
tool.project_workbench.select_hint: Select a manifest on the left
tool.project_workbench.status.split_keyf: Split [{basename}] — scanning keyframes (slower for long videos)…
tool.project_workbench.preset_save_promp: Name for this burn config (overwrites if exists):
tool.project_workbench.preset_default_pr: Default preset is protected; cannot delete
tool.project_workbench.section.sub2: Sub 2 (secondary, lower; leave path empty to skip)
tool.project_workbench.section.wm_image: Image watermark (leave path empty to skip)
tool.project_workbench.section.date: Date overlay (leave text empty to skip)
tool.project_workbench.new_manifest_prom: Enter the manifest basename (unit ID; no path separators):
tool.project_workbench.invalid_basename: Invalid basename (must be non-empty and not contain / \ : * ? " < > |)
tool.project_workbench.confirm_delete_ms:
Delete manifest '{name}'?
(Only the JSON in .videocraft/manifests is removed; other artifacts remain.)
tool.project_workbench.confirm_unsaved_m:
'{name}' has unsaved changes.
Yes → Save
No → Discard
Cancel → Stay on current manifest
tool.project_workbench.confirm_reload_ms: Discard unsaved changes and reload from disk?
tool.project_workbench.confirm_save_befo: Editing must be saved before running. Save and continue?
tool.project_workbench.hint.chain_video: (empty → auto-chains from latest done video step)
tool.project_workbench.hint.chain_srt: (empty → auto-chains from latest subtitle; step3 translation preferred, step2 ASR fallback)
tool.project_workbench.hint.chain_segmen: (empty → auto-chains from step5 pack segments file)
tool.project_workbench.hint.burn_sub1: Top track (translation). Auto-fills only when both step2 ASR and step3 translate are done; single-language case routes to sub2 instead
tool.project_workbench.hint.burn_sub2: Bottom track (original). Bilingual case auto-fills ASR; single-language case also lands here (lone subtitle stays at bottom)
tool.project_workbench.hint.url_or_path: Enter a video URL (http/https — fetched via yt-dlp) or a local file path (registered directly, not copied)
tool.project_workbench.asr_overlap_hint: ⚠ step1 already pulled {lang} SRT ({path}). Running ASR will overwrite it. Disable this step to use the manual SRT instead.
env.section.title: Environment Health
tool.concat_workbench.title: Concatenate Videos
tool.concat_workbench.col.name: File
tool.concat_workbench.hint_need_two: ⚠ Need at least 2 input files to concatenate.
tool.concat_workbench.hint_mismatch_stre: ⚠ Format mismatch in row(s) {rows}. Switch to Re-encode mode, or make the inputs consistent.
tool.concat_workbench.hint_mismatch_reen: ⚠ Format mismatch in row(s) {rows} — will be normalized to the target spec during re-encode.
tool.concat_workbench.log.no_output: ⚠ Set an output file path first.
ui.ai_error.hint.network: DNS, TCP, or TLS issue. Check your internet, VPN, or proxy. Retry usually helps.
ui.ai_error.hint.auth: The API key is invalid, expired, or lacks access. Open the AI Console to update it.
ui.ai_error.hint.quota: Your daily / monthly quota is used up. Wait until reset, or switch to a different provider in the AI Console.
ui.ai_error.hint.rate_limit: Too many requests in a short window. Wait briefly and retry.
ui.ai_error.hint.refused: The model's safety filter blocked this request. Edit the prompt in the AI Console's Prompts tab.
ui.ai_error.hint.malformed: The model's response didn't match the expected schema. Retrying often fixes it; if persistent, the model may need to change.
ui.ai_error.hint.overflow: Input exceeds the model's context window. Shorten the input, or switch to a larger-context model in the AI Console.
ui.ai_error.hint.unknown: An unrecognized error. The original message above may help diagnose it.
ui.ai_error.retry_after_hint: Provider suggests waiting {seconds} seconds before retrying.
tool.clip.title: Clip Script
tool.clip.hint_chapters: Tip: load a subtitle.pack -postprocess.json to populate chapters.
tool.clip.hint_package: Tip: each clip has hook (first 5s) / outro (last 5s) / title / tags. Phase B will add AI generation.
tool.clip.hint_no_vlc: VLC not installed — no preview, but timing + export still work.
tool.clip.warn_no_pil: Pillow not installed — crop preview unavailable
